title: CT2 legal branch run — Minimality and replacement
description: Concrete schema for one legal execution branch of CT2 (Minimality and replacement). A conforming run may use only CT2 node IDs and records, must start at an entry node, follow declared transitions with repetition only on declared loops, align every proof record with its visited node ID, and finish with a matching outcome.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for a branch execution of CT2 (Minimality and replacement); must equal "CT2".

visitedNodeIds.description: Required execution-order path for one actual CT2 (Minimality and replacement) branch. Every item must be a concrete ID from CT2.N01 through CT2.N19; the first must be an entry node, adjacent IDs must follow a declared CT2 transition, and repeats are allowed only on a declared loop.

nodeRecords.description: Required discharge records aligned position-for-position with visitedNodeIds for this CT2 run. The array must have the same length as visitedNodeIds; every item must match one concrete CT2 node-record schema and its nodeId must equal the corresponding visited ID.

x-semanticValidationRules: validate visitedNodeIds as a path in the corresponding tactic transition graph
